Home/Services/AC Tune-Up

AC Tune-Up & Maintenance in Phoenix, AZ

Don't wait for your AC to fail in 115° heat. Our 22-point precision tune-up catches small problems before they become catastrophic ones — and keeps your APS bill in check all summer long.

Book my $89 tune-up Call (602) 773-5522

Phoenix AC systems work harder than almost anywhere in America

Your AC unit runs more hours per year in the Valley than in any other major U.S. city. That's why an annual tune-up isn't a luxury here — it's basic equipment care. A well-maintained system runs 15-30% more efficiently, lasts 4-7 years longer, and is dramatically less likely to fail during the worst week of the summer (which, of course, is when failures always happen).

Our 22-point precision tune-up is more thorough than the "filter and a glance" tune-up most national chains offer. Our techs get into the actual mechanicals — refrigerant pressures, electrical connections, capacitor capacitance, contactor contacts, motor amp draw, drain lines, and indoor air quality. You get a written report of every measurement, plus photos of any issues we spot.

"Best price in the Valley. Fast replacement, friendly techs. Extremely happy with the service." — Keri W., Gilbert

What's included in our 22-point AC tune-up

Refrigerant & cooling performance

  • Check refrigerant pressure (suction & liquid line)
  • Measure superheat and subcooling against manufacturer spec
  • Inspect for visible refrigerant leaks at fittings and coils
  • Verify proper temperature differential at the supply & return
  • Test thermostat calibration and operation

Electrical & mechanical

  • Test capacitor capacitance vs. rated MFD
  • Inspect & tighten all electrical connections
  • Measure compressor & fan motor amp draw
  • Inspect contactor for pitting or burned contacts
  • Lubricate motor bearings where applicable
  • Inspect blower wheel & belt

Coils, drains & airflow

  • Rinse outdoor condenser coil
  • Inspect indoor evaporator coil for dirt & ice formation
  • Clear condensate drain line, treat for algae
  • Inspect & replace standard 1-inch filter (if needed)
  • Check duct connections at the air handler for major leaks

Safety & final report

  • Inspect disconnect, fuses, and breaker
  • Verify safety controls and float switch
  • Document all measurements in a written report
  • Photograph any issues that may need attention

The benefits of regular maintenance

  • Lower energy bills — a clean, calibrated system uses 15-30% less electricity. In Phoenix, that's $40-$80 a month off your summer bills.
  • Fewer breakdowns — most failures are preventable. Catching a weak capacitor in March beats a $400 emergency call in July.
  • Longer equipment life — well-maintained units last 18-22 years. Neglected ones often die at 10-12.
  • Better indoor air quality — clean coils and drains mean less dust, mold spores, and humidity issues.
  • Warranty protection — most manufacturers require documented annual maintenance to honor extended parts warranties.

Comfort Club maintenance plans

Our Comfort Club membership is the easiest way to keep your system running its best — and most members tell us it pays for itself in the first year. For one low monthly rate you get:

  • Two full system tune-ups per year (spring AC + fall heating)
  • Priority scheduling — you skip the line during peak season
  • 15% discount on any repairs
  • No after-hours diagnostic fees
  • Multi-year membership discount on a future replacement

Beat-the-heat tune-up

Our most popular service. 22 points, written report, and a clear, honest assessment of your system.

When should I tune up?

Cooling: late February through April, before the first 100° day. Heating: October through November. Two tune-ups a year is the gold standard for Phoenix systems.

Spring Special

Get a 22-point tune-up before the Phoenix heat hits.

Spots fill fast in March and April. Lock yours in now and save up to 30% on your summer APS bill.
